zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Agnes Turner於大約1528年出生在英國英格蘭爾普雷斯特波利時，她的父親Thomas Turner25歲，母親Benet Goldesmythe19歲。她於1540年與John Harrop在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾艾拉亞斯同結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她於1581年住在英國英格蘭爾莫特拉姆 在 隆格登代爾。她去世於1616年1月29日在英國英格蘭爾馬爾帕斯享年89歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Agnes Turner于大约1528年出生在英国英格兰爾普雷斯特波利时，她的父亲Thomas Turner25岁，母亲Benet Goldesmythe19岁。她于1540年与John Harrop在英国英格兰斯塔福爾艾拉亞斯同结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她于1581年住在英国英格兰爾莫特拉姆 在 隆格登代爾。她去世于1616年1月29日在英国英格兰爾馬爾帕斯享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: Turner
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English t(o)urnour, turner ‘turner’ (Old French to(u)rn(e)our), mainly denoting someone who fashioned small objects of wood, metal, or bone on a lathe, but also a variety of other occupations, including turnspit and translator or interpreter. This surname may have become confused with Toner . In North America, it is also very common among African Americans.

English: occasionally perhaps a nickname from Middle English turn-hare, a compound of Middle English tournen ‘to turn, direct, steer’ + hare ‘hare’, a name for someone in charge of the greyhounds in hare coursing or an exaggerated compliment for someone who could run fast. See also Turnbull .
English: perhaps also from Middle English t(o)urn(e)our ‘jouster, one who takes part in a tournament’ (Old French tornoieor, tournoieur).

variants.name: Trinder
meanings: English (Oxfordshire and Gloucestershire): occupational name from a derivative of Middle English trenden ‘to turn, roll, twist’ (Old English trendan), denoting someone who turned something such as wood or fibres. Compare Turner , Spinner .

variants.name: Toner
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tomhrair ‘descendant of Tomhrar’, a Gaelicized form of the Norse personal name Thorr. Compare Thunder .
English: nickname from Old French toner ‘thunder’, perhaps for someone with a thunderous voice. Compare Thunder .

variants.name: Tarner
meanings: English: variant of   Turner  . This form of the surname is relatively rare in Britain and Ireland. It may sometimes have been confused with   Taverner  .
German (North Rhine-Westphalia): unexplained. This surname is rare in Germany.

variants.name: Turney
meanings: habitational name from any of the places in northern France called Tournai-sur-Dive (Orne), Tournay-sur-Odon (Calvados), or Tourny (Eure), or occasionally from Tournai in Hainaut (Belgium).

perhaps occasionally an occupational name from Middle English tournei, turnai ‘lawyer’ (Anglo-Norman French tourné), or a nickname from Middle English tournei(en) ‘(to) joust, take part in a tournament’ (Old French torneier). Compare Turner .

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Agnes Turner was born about 1528, in Prestbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Turner, was 25 and her mother, Benet Goldesmythe, was 19. She married John Harrop in 1540, in Ellastone, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She lived in Mottram in Longdendale, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom in 1581. She died on 29 January 1616, in Malpas, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Agnes Turner est née environ 1528, à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Turner, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Benet Goldesmythe, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé John Harrop en 1540, à Ellastone, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle a vécu à Mottram in Longdendale, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1581. Elle est décédée le 29 janvier 1616, à Malpas, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Agnes Turner um 1528 in Prestbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Turner 25 und ihre Mutter Benet Goldesmythe 19. Sie hat 1540 in Ellastone, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom John Harrop geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1581 hat sie in Mottram in Longdendale, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Sie starb am 29. it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes Turner è nata il circa 1528 nel Prestbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Turner, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Benet Goldesmythe, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato John Harrop nel 1540, nel Ellastone, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Mottram in Longdendale, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1581. Morì il 29 gennaio 1616, nel Malpas, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Turnerが約1528年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Turnerは25歳，母Benet Goldesmytheは19歳であった。1540年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアエラストーンでJohn Harropと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1581年にはイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアモットラム イン ロングデンダルに住んでいた。彼女は1616年1月29日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアマルプアスで89歳で死去した。

ko.of Mottram in Longdendale, Cheshire, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 모트램 인 론그데데일
ko., Mottram-in-Longdendale, Cheshire, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 모트램 인 론그데데일
ko.Mottram In Longdendale,Cheshire,England: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 모트램 인 론그데데일
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Turner(이)가 대략 1528년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 프레스트버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Turner(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Benet Goldesmythe(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1540년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 엘라스톤에서 John Harrop(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1581년도에 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 모트램 인 론그데데일에서 살았다. 그녀는 1616년 1월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 맬파스에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes Turner nasceu aproximadamente 1528, em Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Turner, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Benet Goldesmythe, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com John Harrop em 1540, em Ellastone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela viveu em Mottram in Longdendale, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1581. Ela faleceu em 29 de janeiro de 1616, em Malpas, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Agnes Turner родилась около 1528 г. в местности престбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Turner было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Benet Goldesmythe, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Harrop в 1540 г. в местности элластоун, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она жила в местности моттрам ин лонгдендеил, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в 1581 году. Она умерла 29 января 1616 г. в местности малпас, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 89 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Agnes Turner nació aproximadamente 1528, en Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Turner, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Benet Goldesmythe, tenía 19 años. Se casó con John Harrop en 1540, en Ellastone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Mottram in Longdendale, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1581. Murió el 29 de enero de 1616, en Malpas, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 89 años.
